title: Wooly String
description: A mod that simply adds the ability to craft wool into string
body:
Adds the ability to craft wool of any colour into 4 string by putting it anywhere in the crafting menu.

Inspired by [Boffy](https://www.youtube.com/@Boffy) forgetting that you can make wool with 4 string. Hopefully he enjoys having his mistake immortalised on the internet!

Also available on [Curseforge](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/wooly-string)
